name: Creamy Ranch Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, process the cottage cheese and yogurt until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a bowl.
3. Stir in the chopped green onions and seasonings.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
5. Store in an airtight container for up to one week.
6. Stir before serving.
Makes approximately 1 2/3 cups. Serving size: 3 tablespoons (about 37 calories, 3 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, and 1 gram fat).
